hypothesis: If chemical articles are converted to structure-preserving markdown with GPT-4o-generated image captions and then parsed by a single-agent LLM with standardized schema prompts, then end-to-end information extraction on ChemX nanozyme and chelate-complex datasets will achieve higher F1 and better output-format compliance than domain-specific multi-agent systems and general-purpose baselines because preserving document structure and avoiding inter-agent coordination reduces extraction and formatting errors.
